  • Candidates must have a Bachelor’s degree from an NCTE-recognized institution along with a valid teacher training qualification such as BTC, B.El.Ed, or equivalent. In some cases, candidates with 50% marks in intermediate and a 4-year integrated teaching program can also apply.
